title: Crispy Syrian Sesame Stir-Fry
description: A salty and crispy Syrian dish with a twist of sake for an adventurous flavor profile, perfect as a side dish or light meal.
instructions: Mix Panko breadcrumbs with flour and salt. Add beaten eggs to a shallow dish.
Dip shrimp in egg mixture, then coat thoroughly in breadcrumb-flour mixture. Place on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake for 20 minutes or until golden brown. Remove from oven and let cool slightly.
In a large skillet over medium heat, sauté red bell pepper slices for about 5 minutes until soft.
Add shrimp to the skillet and stir-fry for another 5 minutes until cooked through.
Stir in green onions just before serving. Serve hot with crispy sesame coating on top of the shrimp.
Optional: You can add other vegetables like carrots or zucchini for extra nutrition.
